subcodes.first_line: We found Ourselves at dawn in a palace which God had made the seat of His mighty Throne, and We purposed another destination, whereunto We arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصبحنا فی قصر جعله الله مقر عرشه العظیم و قصدنا مقصدا آخر فلمنا وردنا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement
